understanding.goal_understanding: Get any pushable object—the selected controllable piece or any pushable block—to reach or exceed the target x-coordinate (level.target_x).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each MOVE action shifts the selected controllable by one STEP (3 pixels) in the direction; if a pushable (block) is adjacent, it pushes along one STEP too. Walls and boundaries block movement variably—some stop direct moves but allow or differently handle pushes against them. SELECT switches control to another controllable by ID; hints like movement.direction_blocked indicate adjacent obstacles but not guaranteed success.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | Push the block right by moving sel right; if successful, pb reaches x=6 and wins, as it's adjacent and pushable.
history.reasoning: Push the block right by moving sel right; if successful, pb reaches x=6 and wins, as it's adjacent and pushable.
